eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Kansas; at 11:49 PM on OCT 7, 2019 Effective until 12:49 AM OCT 8, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a coordinated monthly test of all broadcast stations in Kansas and the Kansas City metropolitan area, sent from the Kansas Division of Emergency Management in Topeka.
